flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Harrisburg Area Community College fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (19.5% → 13.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Harrisburg Area Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (9.8k vs 12.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Harrisburg Area Community College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (11.3k → 9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Harrisburg Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
